name: mcp-database-query-app
description: Database management MCP server for PostgreSQL, SQL Server etc. Provides tools for connecting, querying, schema introspection, script management, and interactive visualization.
long_description: MCP Database Query App is a full-featured MCP server for database operations. It supports PostgreSQL and SQL Server with features including parameterised queries, result pagination, execution plans, saved scripts, schema exploration, notes on database objects, and interactive UI components for data visualization.

read_only.title: Read-only mode
read_only.description: Block INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/DDL by default. Individual sessions can still opt in to writes when permitted.

max_result_limit.title: Max result rows
max_result_limit.description: Hard cap on rows returned by a single query. Lower to reduce memory pressure; raise if you routinely work with large result sets.

ui_enabled.title: Enable UI tools
ui_enabled.description: Expose the ui_chart, ui_schema_view, and db_builder_open tools that render interactive HTML components in the client.

master_key.title: Master key
master_key.description: AES-256 key for encrypting stored database credentials. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32

tools.name: db_query_next_page
tools.description: Fetch the next page of a paginated query.

tools.name: db_explain
tools.description: Return the execution plan for a query.

tools.name: db_schemas_list
tools.description: List schemas in the current database.

tools.name: db_table_describe
tools.description: Describe a table's columns, keys, and indexes.

tools.name: db_describe_batch
tools.description: Describe multiple objects in one call.

tools.name: db_schema_describe
tools.description: Describe a schema and its contents.

tools.name: db_database_describe
tools.description: Describe a database's schemas and objects.

tools.name: notes_set
tools.description: Attach a note to a database object.

tools.name: notes_get
tools.description: Get a note on a database object.

tools.name: notes_delete
tools.description: Delete a note on a database object.

tools.name: db_builder_open
tools.description: Open the interactive query builder UI.

tools.name: ui_chart
tools.description: Render a chart from a result set.

tools.name: ui_results_export_csv
tools.description: Export a result set to CSV.

prompts.name: explore-database
prompts.description: Guided walkthrough of a database's schemas and tables.
prompts.text: Connect to the target database, list its schemas and tables, then summarise the structure and notable objects. Highlight tables with unusual size, missing primary keys, or notes attached.

prompts.name: safe-write
prompts.description: Plan and execute a write with guardrails and preview.
prompts.text: Before running any INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE, show the affected rows with a SELECT preview, confirm row counts, wrap the change in a transaction, and require explicit confirmation before COMMIT.

prompts.name: migrate-script
prompts.description: Convert a SQL script between dialects.
prompts.text: Translate the provided SQL script from its source dialect to the target dialect (e.g. SQL Server to PostgreSQL). Call out syntax, type, and function differences, and flag anything that cannot be translated automatically.

prompts.name: explain-slow-query
prompts.description: Analyse and suggest fixes for a slow query.
prompts.text: Run db_explain on the query, interpret the plan, identify the dominant cost (scans, joins, sorts, missing indexes), and propose concrete fixes with expected impact.
